_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Jarren Duran homers twice in 9-1 blowout, Sox explode for 6 in the 9th at Cleveland
items.snark: Sox offense finally showed up for one night, scored six runs in the ninth like they remembered they get paid to hit.

items.headline: Connor Wong leads Red Sox past Guardians 9-1 with two-run single in ninth
items.snark: Wong finally came through in the clutch, which is a sentence Sox fans say once every two weeks.

items.headline: Red Sox 23-33, sitting 13 games back of Rays in AL East after falling to Guardians
items.snark: Thirteen games back in May, time to fire John Henry into the sun and start fresh.

items.headline: Patriots confident in D-line depth despite Khyiris Tonga leaving in free agency
items.snark: Confident in depth after losing their best interior run stuffer, Patriots gaslighting themselves again.
